keyEvents.text: First Half ends, Washington Spirit 0, Portland Thorns 0.
Goal! Washington Spirit 0, Portland Thorns 1. Olivia Moultrie (Portland Thorns) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Pietra Tordin.
Substitution, Portland Thorns. Shae Harvey replaces Cassandra Bogere.
Substitution, Portland Thorns. Maddie Padelski replaces Reilyn Turner.
Substitution, Washington Spirit. Sofia Cantore replaces Gift Monday.
Substitution, Washington Spirit. Claudia Martínez replaces Leicy Santos.
Substitution, Portland Thorns. Sophia Wilson replaces Pietra Tordin.
Substitution, Washington Spirit. Tamara Bolt replaces Rosemonde Kouassi.
Substitution, Washington Spirit. Paige Metayer replaces Gabrielle Carle.
Substitution, Washington Spirit. Deborah Abiodun replaces Rebeca Bernal.
Substitution, Portland Thorns. Alexa Spaanstra replaces Mimi Alidou.
